# kemp_match_content_rule (Data Source)

Reads a system-level content-match rule by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_match_content_rule" "existing" {
  name = "match-api-path"
}

output "pattern" {
  value = data.kemp_match_content_rule.existing.pattern
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Rule name.

### Read-Only

- `header` (String) Header or scope the pattern is applied to.
- `ignore_case` (Boolean)
- `include_host` (Boolean)
- `include_query` (Boolean)
- `match_type` (String) Match strategy: `regex`, `prefix`, or `postfix`.
- `must_fail` (Boolean)
- `negate` (Boolean)
- `only_on_flag` (Number)
- `only_on_no_flag` (Number)
- `pattern` (String) Pattern matched against the request.
- `set_on_match` (Number)
